title: Bedwars Essentials
description: Improvment and Utility Mods And Texturepack for bedwars! 1.16.5 Only
body: this modpack adds texture pack compatibility, chat optimization, better 3d textures compatibility, pvp optimizations and utility, enabled multiplayer for offline users, low fire, low shield, low totems, barebones, old texture packs, and more! this is mainly for bedwars but u can use it to play basically any minigame recommended for 1.8 pvp games because 1.16.5 works best with 1.8 pvp as compared to newer versions like 1.18-1.21.
